title: Fresh Undopia Zombie Skins
description: Make Undopia Zombie Skins compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
This resourcepack adds compatibility between [Undopia Zombie Skins](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-zombie-skins) and [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), providing missing animations and fixing some texture errors.

All assets belong to Undopia Zombie Skins author, check out original resourcepack!

---
This Resource Pack requires:
- [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)
or 
- [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).

---
